# The Daily Snapshot Job Failed Because The Backup Role Lost The Select Grant On The New Partitions
Postgres migration 0042 adds a NOT NULL column without a default; backfill will take 4 hours on prod. Read replica lag hit 12s during the bulk import; we need to batch the writes smaller. Foreign key cascade on org_memberships is deleting audit entries — the constraint should be RESTRICT.
